L. 111–11, title VII, § 7113(a)(1)123 Stat. 1201Mar. 30, 2009“(1).—In generalThe Palo Alto Battlefield National Historic Site shall be known and designated as the ‘Palo Alto Battlefield National Historical Park’.“(2).—ReferencesAny reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the historic site referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Palo Alto Battlefield National Historical Park.”

children.text: The study conducted by the National Park Service under has resulted in a precise identification of the location of the Battle of Palo Alto and the area requiring protection.section 506(b) of Public Law 95–625
Palo Alto is the only unit of the National Park System directed to the preservation and interpretation of resources related to the Mexican-American War.
